summary: Final UI and Document Polish Pass - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All table+drawer patterns working. AI widget correctly hidden on transaction pages after fix. PDF generation with status-aware payment blocks working.
critical_code_review_comments: InvoicesPageV2.jsx: Full-width table with Date, Invoice, Payer, Amount, Status columns (no Action column) - VERIFIED
InvoicesPageV2.jsx: PaymentStatusBlock shows 'Paid in Full' (green) or 'Awaiting Payment' with bank details - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: Full-width table with Date, Quote, Items, Amount, Status columns - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: Full-width table with Date, Order, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment columns - VERIFIED
AIChatWidget.jsx: Fixed to hide on /dashboard/invoices, /dashboard/quotes, /dashboard/orders - FIXED AND VERIFIED
public_payment_info_routes.py: Returns bank details from .env (CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002) - VERIFIED
pdf_generation_routes.py: Status-aware payment block + CFO signature for paid invoices - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI polish features verified. Tables use master Table + Right Drawer pattern. AI widget hidden on /dashboard/invoices, /dashboard/quotes, /dashboard/orders. Payment info endpoint returns real bank details. PDF generation includes status-aware payment blocks and CFO signature for paid invoices.

GATE_1_INVOICES_TABLE.details: Full-width table with Date, Invoice, Payer, Amount, Status columns. No Action column. data-testid='invoices-table' present.

GATE_2_INVOICES_SORTED_DESC.details: Invoices sorted newest first (DESC by created_at). Frontend sorts in useEffect.

GATE_3_INVOICE_DRAWER.details: Drawer opens on row click. Shows BrandLogo md size, status badge, Bill To, PaymentStatusBlock.

GATE_4_PAID_INVOICE_DRAWER.details: Paid invoice drawer shows 'Paid in Full' in green PaymentStatusBlock.

GATE_5_PENDING_INVOICE_DRAWER.details: Pending invoice drawer shows 'Awaiting Payment' with real bank details: CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, Main Branch, CORUTZTZ.

GATE_6_QUOTES_TABLE.details: Full-width table with Date, Quote, Items, Amount, Status columns. data-testid='quotes-table' present.

GATE_7_QUOTE_DRAWER.details: Quote drawer opens on row click. Shows BrandLogo md, Quote Preview, items, totals, Download Quote button.

GATE_8_ORDERS_TABLE.details: Full-width table with Date, Order, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment columns. data-testid='orders-table' present.

GATE_9_ORDER_DRAWER.details: Order drawer opens on row click. Shows BrandLogo md, Order Details, vendor info, items.

GATE_10_AI_WIDGET_HIDDEN.details: AI Chat Widget NOT visible on /dashboard/invoices, /dashboard/quotes, /dashboard/orders. Fixed AIChatWidget.jsx line 113 to include /dashboard/* paths.

GATE_11_PAYMENT_INFO_API.details: /api/public/payment-info returns bank details from .env: CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, Main Branch, CORUTZTZ, TZS.

GATE_12_INVOICE_PDF.details: /api/pdf/invoices/{id} returns PDF with status-aware payment block and bank details. PDF generated successfully (16KB for paid, 14KB for pending).

GATE_13_CFO_SIGNATURE.details: Invoice PDF for paid invoices includes CFO signature/stamp block. Verified in pdf_generation_routes.py lines 217-231.
